body:
### Summary

This PR improves the user experience on the error page by displaying localized messages based on HTTP status codes.

### Changes

- Updated `error.html` to show different messages for:
  - `404 Not Found`
  - `500 Internal Server Error`
  - other unexpected errors
- Added the following message keys to all supported language property files:
  - `error.404`
  - `error.500`
  - `error.general`

### Languages Updated

- English (`messages.properties`)
- Korean (`messages_ko.properties`)
- German (`messages_de.properties`)
- Spanish (`messages_es.properties`)
- Persian (`messages_fa.properties`)
- Portuguese (`messages_pt.properties`)
- Russian (`messages_ru.properties`)
- Turkish (`messages_tr.properties`)

> `messages_en.properties` was intentionally left blank since English is the default (`messages.properties`).

### Motivation

Provides clearer, more user-friendly error messages to users in their native language, especially in case of navigation or server issues.

comments.body:

title: Enhance error page with localized messages for HTTP status codes
